name: feature-dev
description: Guided feature development with codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review.

interface.shortDescription: Guide feature work from discovery through codebase exploration, architecture design, implementation, quality review, and summary.
interface.longDescription: The Feature Development Plugin provides a systematic 7-phase approach to building new features. Instead of jumping straight into code, it guides you through understanding the codebase, asking clarifying questions, designing architecture, and ensuring quality—resulting in better-designed features that integrate seamlessly with your existing code
interface.defaultPrompt: Implement this feature from discovery through implementation and review.
